2604.27591.title: ClipTBP: Clip-Pair based Temporal Boundary Prediction with Boundary-Aware Learning for Moment Retrieval
2604.27591.paper_summary: Video moment retrieval is the task of retrieving specific segments of a video corresponding to a given text query. Recent studies have been conducted to improve multimodal alignment performance through visual-linguistic similarity learning at the snippet-level and transformer-based temporal boundary regression. However, existing models do not calculate similarity by considering the relationships between multiple answer segments that match the query. Therefore, existing models are easily influenced by visually similar segments in the surrounding context. Existing models calculate similarity at the snippet-level and ignore the relationships between multiple answer segments corresponding to a single query. Therefore, they struggle to exclude segments irrelevant to the query. To address this issues, we propose ClipTBP, a clip-pair temporal boundary prediction framework based on boundary-aware learning. ClipTBP introduces a clip-level alignment loss for explicitly learning the semantic relationship between answer segments. ClipTBP also predicts accurate temporal boundaries by applying both main boundary loss and auxiliary boundary loss. ClipTBP consistently improves performance when applied to various existing models and demonstrates more robust boundary prediction performance even in ambiguous query scenarios.
2604.27591.paper_summary_zh: 視頻片段檢索是根據給定的文本查詢檢索視頻中特定片段的任務。最近的研究旨在通過在片段級別進行視覺-語言相似性學習和基於Transformer的時間邊界回歸來改善多模態對齊性能。然而，現有模型在計算相似性時並未考慮匹配查詢的多個答案片段之間的關係。因此，現有模型容易受到周圍上下文中視覺上相似片段的影響。現有模型在片段級別計算相似性，並忽略了與單個查詢對應的多個答案片段之間的關係。因此，它們難以排除與查詢無關的片段。為了解決這些問題，我們提出了ClipTBP，一種基於邊界感知學習的片段對時間邊界預測框架。ClipTBP引入了一種片段級別對齊損失，以明確學習答案片段之間的語義關係。ClipTBP還通過同時應用主要邊界損失和輔助邊界損失來預測準確的時間邊界。當應用於各種現有模型時，ClipTBP始終提高性能，並在模糊查詢場景中顯示出更穩健的邊界預測性能。
2604.27591.author: Ji-Hyeon Kim et.al.
2604.27591.authors: Ji-Hyeon Kim, Ho-Joong Kim, Seong-Whan Lee
